title: Purpose
doc_html:
§2381.2. Purpose

            The purpose of this Chapter is to establish standards for community air monitoring programs operated by entities to ensure that the data collected from such programs provides the public with access to accurate air quality information.

            Acts 2024, No. 181, §1, eff. May 23, 2024.
doc_text:
§2381.2. Purpose
The purpose of this Chapter is to establish standards for community air monitoring
programs operated by entities to ensure that the data collected from such programs provides
the public with access to accurate air quality information.
Acts 2024, No. 181, §1, eff. May 23, 2024.
